title: EUSPA fifth Horizon Europe call: Galileo & Copernicus for the EU Preparedness Union
summary: EUSPA fifth Horizon Europe call (HORIZON-2027-EUSPA-SPACE-51) targets solutions using Galileo and Copernicus to support the EU Preparedness Union Strategy.
body: The Cluster 4 Digital, Industry and Space Work Programme 2026-2027 introduces EUSPAs fifth call, focused on Galileo and Copernicus contributions to the EU Preparedness Union Strategy. Topics include linking early-warning systems to civil-protection mechanisms and climate-adaptation planning. Full details will appear on the Funding & Tenders portal.
